title: PREPARE crashes mserver if unbound variable is function parameter
poc: SELECT id FROM tables WHERE name = ?;
SELECT id FROM tables WHERE name = LOWER(?);
key_bug_features: Unbound variable as function parameter in PREPARE statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
PREPARE stmt1 FROM 'SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = ?';
PREPARE stmt2 FROM 'SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = LOWER(?);
